title: Quran, Sura 83: Al-Mutaffifin
description: Sura 83 (Al-Mutaffifin: The Defrauding) from the Holy Quran.
introduction: Sura 83 (Al-Mutaffifin: The Defrauding) from the Holy Quran.

translation.text: Woe to those who give less than due, who, when they take a measure from people, take in full, but if they give by measure or by weight to them, they cause loss.
